query: SELECT year, month, COUNT(*) as demoCount FROM pipedrive_demo_activities WHERE aeId = 60001 AND isValid = 1 GROUP BY year, month ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ELZY9nPkashd2p.root --database gAuoMoig6vkmXbQaeq6Bo3 --execute SELECT year, month, COUNT(*) as demoCount FROM pipedrive_demo_activities WHERE aeId = 60001 AND isValid = 1 GROUP BY year, month ORDER BY year DESC, month DESC
